options.content:
## Apex Banking — Service Map

| Service | Language | Framework | Inbound | Outbound | External APIs |
|:--------|:---------|:----------|:--------|:---------|:--------------|
| **frontend** | TypeScript | Next.js 14 | HTTP | HTTP | → ai-service |
| **ai-service** | Python | FastAPI | HTTP | HTTP | Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, xAI, OpenRouter |
| **api-gateway** | Java 17 | Spring Cloud Gateway | HTTP | HTTP | → user, accounts, transactions |
| **user-service** | C# | .NET 8 | REST | REST, PostgreSQL | Socure, Jumio, HIBP |
| **accounts-service** | Java 17 | Spring Boot | REST | REST, PostgreSQL, S3 | Plaid, Exchange Rates, Moody's |
| **transactions-service** | Java 17 | Spring Boot | REST | REST, gRPC, Kafka, PostgreSQL | Stripe, PayPal, ComplyAdvantage |
| **fraud-service** | Go 1.22 | stdlib gRPC | gRPC | HTTP | Stripe Radar, Sift, MaxMind |
| **notification-service** | Go 1.22 | stdlib HTTP | Kafka | HTTP, MongoDB | SendGrid, Twilio, Slack |
| **simulation-client** | Node.js | Axios | — | HTTP | (traffic generator) |

---

### Languages: 6
`TypeScript` · `Python` · `C#` · `Java` · `Go` · `Node.js`

### Infrastructure

| Component | Purpose |
|:----------|:--------|
| PostgreSQL 15 | Shared DB (user, accounts, transactions schemas) |
| MongoDB 7 | Notification event store |
| Redis 7 | API Gateway rate limiting |
| Kafka (Bitnami) | Async transaction events |
| OTel Collector | Metrics + traces pipeline |
| Prometheus | Metrics storage |
| Loki | Log aggregation |
| Jaeger | Distributed tracing |

## Auth Mechanisms (for DLP)

Every external API call uses a different auth pattern — all captured by eBPF:

### Header-based
| Header | Service | API |
|:-------|:--------|:----|
| `x-api-key` | ai-service | Anthropic |
| `Authorization: Bearer` | ai-service, user, accounts, transactions | OpenAI, xAI, OpenRouter, Jumio, Moody's, Stripe, PayPal |
| `Authorization: Basic` | fraud, notification | MaxMind, Twilio |
| `Authorization: SocureApiKey` | user | Socure |
| `Authorization: Token` | transactions | ComplyAdvantage |
| `hibp-api-key` | user | Have I Been Pwned |
| `PLAID-CLIENT-ID` | accounts | Plaid |
| `PLAID-SECRET` | accounts | Plaid |

### Query parameter
| Param | Service | API |
|:------|:--------|:----|
| `key` | ai-service | Gemini |
| `app_id` | accounts | Open Exchange Rates |

### Body field
| Field | Service | API |
|:------|:--------|:----|
| `$api_key` | fraud | Sift Science |

---

### Protocol Summary
| Protocol | Where |
|:---------|:------|
| HTTP/REST | All services |
| gRPC | transactions → fraud |
| Kafka | transactions → notification |
| MongoDB wire | notification → mongodb |
| PostgreSQL wire | user, accounts, transactions |
